# Broken Links Test

This file contains intentionally broken wikilinks for testing diagnostics.

- [[nonexistent-note]] — this note does not exist
- [[missing-page]] — also missing
- [[deleted-file]] — was removed
- [[alice]] — this one is valid

Some text with [[another-broken-link]] inline.

A valid link to [[zed-plugin]] and a broken [[ghost-note]].
